---
title: "Pheast_Osteosarcoma"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading in data set: TARGET - OS/Xena

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(limma)
```

```{r}
target_expr <- read_tsv(
  "TARGET-OS.star_counts.tsv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

target_clinical <- read_tsv(
  "TARGET-OS.clinical.tsv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

dim(target_expr)
dim(target_clinical)

head(target_expr[, 1:5])
head(target_clinical)

```

```{r}
target_expr_mat <- target_expr %>%
  column_to_rownames("Ensembl_ID") %>%
  as.matrix()

storage.mode(target_expr_mat) <- "numeric"

dim(target_expr_mat)
target_expr_mat[1:5, 1:3]
```

```{r}
# Remove Ensembl version numbers
target_ensembl_clean <- str_remove(
  rownames(target_expr_mat),
  "\\..*$"
)

# CD24 Ensembl ID
cd24_ensembl <- "ENSG00000272398"

target_cd24_idx <- which(target_ensembl_clean == cd24_ensembl)

target_cd24_idx
rownames(target_expr_mat)[target_cd24_idx]
```

```{r}
target_cd24_expr <- tibble(
  sample_id = colnames(target_expr_mat),
  CD24_expr = as.numeric(target_expr_mat[target_cd24_idx, ])
)

head(target_cd24_expr)
summary(target_cd24_expr$CD24_expr)
```

```{r}
target_meta <- target_clinical %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample,
    patient_id = submitter_id,
    vital_status = as.character(`vital_status.demographic`),
    age_years = as.numeric(
      `age_at_earliest_diagnosis_in_years.diagnoses.xena_derived`
    ),
    days_to_death = as.numeric(`days_to_death.demographic`),
    days_to_last_follow_up = as.numeric(`days_to_last_follow_up.diagnoses`),
    sample_type = `sample_type.samples`,
    tissue_type = `tissue_type.samples`,
    primary_diagnosis = `primary_diagnosis.diagnoses`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    os_event = case_when(
      str_to_upper(vital_status) == "DEAD" ~ 1,
      str_to_upper(vital_status) == "ALIVE" ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    os_days = case_when(
      os_event == 1 ~ days_to_death,
      os_event == 0 ~ days_to_last_follow_up,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

target_meta %>%
  mutate(missing_os_days = is.na(os_days)) %>%
  dplyr::count(vital_status, os_event, missing_os_days)

```

```{r}
target_meta_surv <- target_meta %>%
  filter(!is.na(os_days))

target_meta_surv %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
target_cd24 <- target_meta_surv %>%
  inner_join(target_cd24_expr, by = "sample_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr)) %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High",
      "CD24 Low"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low", "CD24 High")
    )
  )

target_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(target_cd24$CD24_group)
```

```{r}
target_cd24_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  os_days ~ CD24_group,
  data = target_cd24
)

target_cd24_wilcox
```

```{r}
target_cd24_spearman <- cor.test(
  target_cd24$CD24_expr,
  target_cd24$os_days,
  method = "spearman"
)

target_cd24_spearman
```

#### KM for Target Dataset

```{r}
# TARGET-OS Kaplan-Meier-style curve with labeled risk table rows
# Converted from days to months for consistent axis labeling.

library(survival)
library(survminer)

# Make sure CD24 group labels are clean and convert days to months
target_cd24 <- target_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    os_months = os_days / 30.44,
    CD24_group = case_when(
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "Low") ~ "CD24 Low tumors",
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "High") ~ "CD24 High tumors",
      TRUE ~ as.character(CD24_group)
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Fit survival curve
target_cd24_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = target_cd24
)

# Log-rank test
target_cd24_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = target_cd24
)

target_cd24_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  target_cd24_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(target_cd24_logrank$n) - 1
)

# KM-style plot with labeled risk table
target_cd24_km <- ggsurvplot(
  target_cd24_fit,
  data = target_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(target_cd24_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(80, 0.90),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

# Format main KM plot
target_cd24_km$plot <- target_cd24_km$plot +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 20)
  )

# Format risk table so labels show clearly
target_cd24_km$table <- target_cd24_km$table +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 100)
  )

target_cd24_km

# Save figure
png(
  "TARGET_OS_pediatric_CD24_KM_risk_table_months_labeled_axes.png",
  width = 2000,
  height = 1500,
  res = 200
)

print(target_cd24_km)

dev.off()

# Print p-value
target_cd24_logrank_p
```

### TARGET-OS/Xena Subtype Check:

```{r}
# TARGET-OS/Xena subtype and clinical feature check
# This is separate from the main KM filtering chunk.

target_subtype_check <- target_clinical %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample,
    patient_id = submitter_id,
    vital_status = as.character(`vital_status.demographic`),
    age_years = as.numeric(
      `age_at_earliest_diagnosis_in_years.diagnoses.xena_derived`
    ),
    days_to_death = as.numeric(`days_to_death.demographic`),
    days_to_last_follow_up = as.numeric(`days_to_last_follow_up.diagnoses`),
    primary_diagnosis = `primary_diagnosis.diagnoses`,
    metastasis_at_diagnosis = `metastasis_at_diagnosis.diagnoses`,
    tumor_grade = `tumor_grade.diagnoses`,
    classification_of_tumor = `classification_of_tumor.diagnoses`,
    site_of_resection_or_biopsy = `site_of_resection_or_biopsy.diagnoses`,
    tissue_or_organ_of_origin = `tissue_or_organ_of_origin.diagnoses`,
    sample_type = `sample_type.samples`,
    tissue_type = `tissue_type.samples`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    os_event = case_when(
      str_to_upper(vital_status) == "DEAD" ~ 1,
      str_to_upper(vital_status) == "ALIVE" ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    os_days = case_when(
      os_event == 1 ~ days_to_death,
      os_event == 0 ~ days_to_last_follow_up,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    age_group = case_when(
      age_years <= 18 ~ "<=18",
      age_years <= 21 ~ "19-21",
      age_years > 21 ~ ">21",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21
  ) %>%
  inner_join(target_cd24_expr, by = "sample_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr))

target_subtype_check %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    usable_survival_time = sum(!is.na(os_days))
  )

target_subtype_check %>%
  dplyr::count(age_group)

target_subtype_check %>%
  dplyr::count(metastasis_at_diagnosis, sort = TRUE)

target_subtype_check %>%
  dplyr::count(primary_diagnosis, sort = TRUE)

target_subtype_check %>%
  dplyr::count(classification_of_tumor, sort = TRUE)

target_subtype_check %>%
  dplyr::count(site_of_resection_or_biopsy, sort = TRUE)
```

```{r}
##### TARGET-OS CD24 Group + Metastasis Subgroup Check

target_cd24_metastasis <- target_subtype_check %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    metastasis_at_diagnosis %in% c("No Metastasis", "Metastasis, NOS"),
    !is.na(os_days),
    !is.na(os_event),
    !is.na(CD24_expr)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    os_months = os_days / 30.44,
    
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    ),
    
    metastasis_group = case_when(
      metastasis_at_diagnosis == "No Metastasis" ~ "No metastasis",
      metastasis_at_diagnosis == "Metastasis, NOS" ~ "Metastasis at diagnosis",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    metastasis_group = factor(
      metastasis_group,
      levels = c("No metastasis", "Metastasis at diagnosis")
    )
  )

target_cd24_metastasis %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group, metastasis_group)

target_cd24_metastasis %>%
  group_by(CD24_group, metastasis_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#### TARGET-OS CD24 Low: Survival by Metastasis at Diagnosis

target_low_metastasis <- target_cd24_metastasis %>%
  filter(CD24_group == "CD24 Low tumors")

target_low_metastasis %>%
  dplyr::count(metastasis_group)

target_low_meta_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ metastasis_group,
  data = target_low_metastasis
)

target_low_meta_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ metastasis_group,
  data = target_low_metastasis
)

target_low_meta_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  target_low_meta_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(target_low_meta_logrank$n) - 1
)

target_low_meta_km <- ggsurvplot(
  target_low_meta_fit,
  data = target_low_metastasis,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(target_low_meta_p, 3)),
pval.coord = c(75, 0.90),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c("No metastasis", "Metastasis at diagnosis"),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

target_low_meta_km$table <- target_low_meta_km$table +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("No metastasis", "Metastasis at diagnosis")) +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

target_low_meta_km

png(
  "TARGET_OS_CD24_low_metastasis_KM_age21under.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(target_low_meta_km)

dev.off()

target_low_meta_p
```

```{r}
#### TARGET-OS CD24 High: Survival by Metastasis at Diagnosis

target_high_metastasis <- target_cd24_metastasis %>%
  filter(CD24_group == "CD24 High tumors")

target_high_metastasis %>%
  dplyr::count(metastasis_group)

target_high_meta_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ metastasis_group,
  data = target_high_metastasis
)

target_high_meta_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ metastasis_group,
  data = target_high_metastasis
)

target_high_meta_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  target_high_meta_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(target_high_meta_logrank$n) - 1
)

target_high_meta_km <- ggsurvplot(
  target_high_meta_fit,
  data = target_high_metastasis,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(target_high_meta_p, 3)),
pval.coord = c(75, 0.90),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c("No metastasis", "Metastasis at diagnosis"),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

target_high_meta_km$table <- target_high_meta_km$table +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("No metastasis", "Metastasis at diagnosis")) +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

target_high_meta_km

png(
  "TARGET_OS_CD24_high_metastasis_KM_age21under.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(target_high_meta_km)

dev.off()

target_high_meta_p
```

### Loading in Openpedcan:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

base_url <- "https://cbioportal-api.ccdi.cancer.gov/api"
study_id <- "openpedcan_v15"

expr_profile_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
sample_list_id <- "openpedcan_v15_rna_seq_v2_mrna"
```

```{r}
cd24_entrez <- 100133941

cd24_expr <- request(
  paste0(
    base_url,
    "/molecular-profiles/",
    expr_profile_id,
    "/molecular-data/fetch"
  )
) %>%
  req_method("POST") %>%
  req_body_json(
    list(
      entrezGeneIds = list(cd24_entrez),
      sampleListId = sample_list_id
    )
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

cd24_expr_clean <- cd24_expr %>%
  transmute(
    sampleId = sampleId,
    patientId = patientId,
    CD24_expr = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr))

head(cd24_expr_clean)
summary(cd24_expr_clean$CD24_expr)
nrow(cd24_expr_clean)
```

```{r}
# Pull OpenPedCan clinical data

openped_clinical_sample <- request(
  paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")
) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "SAMPLE",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

openped_clinical_patient <- request(
  paste0(base_url, "/studies/", study_id, "/clinical-data")
) %>%
  req_url_query(
    clinicalDataType = "PATIENT",
    projection = "DETAILED"
  ) %>%
  req_perform() %>%
  resp_body_json(simplifyVector = TRUE) %>%
  as_tibble()

# Make sample clinical table wide
openped_clinical_sample_wide <- openped_clinical_sample %>%
  select(sampleId, patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = list(value = dplyr::first)
  )

# Make patient clinical table wide
openped_clinical_patient_wide <- openped_clinical_patient %>%
  select(patientId, clinicalAttributeId, value) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = clinicalAttributeId,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = list(value = dplyr::first)
  )

# Merge sample + patient clinical metadata
openped_clinical <- openped_clinical_sample_wide %>%
  left_join(
    openped_clinical_patient_wide,
    by = "patientId"
  )

# Check survival and cancer columns
colnames(openped_clinical)[
  str_detect(
    colnames(openped_clinical),
    regex(
      "OS|SURV|DEATH|VITAL|STATUS|MONTH|DAYS|CANCER|DIAG|TUMOR",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )
]
```

#### \[OPEN PEDCAN\] Filter to Osteosarcoma & filter age:

```{r}
# Merge CD24 expression with OpenPedCan clinical metadata
openped_cd24_surv <- cd24_expr_clean %>%
  left_join(openped_clinical, by = c("sampleId", "patientId"))

# Filter to age 21 and under first
openped_cd24_surv_21_under <- openped_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = as.numeric(AGE)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21
  )

# Check age-filtered dataset
openped_cd24_surv_21_under %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
# Filter age 21-and-under OpenPedCan data to osteosarcoma only
openped_osteo_cd24 <- openped_cd24_surv_21_under %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    os_months = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS),
    os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(cancer_type, regex("osteosarcoma", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

# Check final osteosarcoma survival dataset
openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(openped_osteo_cd24$cancer_type)
table(openped_osteo_cd24$os_event)
```

#### \[open pedcan\] Split CD24 High & Low :

```{r}
# Create CD24 High vs Low groups using median CD24 expression

openped_osteo_cd24 <- openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High",
      "CD24 Low"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low", "CD24 High")
    )
  )

# Check group sizes
openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group)

# Check survival and age summary by group
openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Osteosarcoma: CD24 KM
#### Low = black, High = pink
#### Age <= 21 only

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)

# Prepare KM data
openped_osteo_cd24 <- openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Check that CD24 High really has higher expression
openped_osteo_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_CD24 = min(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_CD24 = max(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Fit KM curve
openped_osteo_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_osteo_cd24
)

# Check strata order
names(openped_osteo_fit$strata)

# Log-rank test
openped_osteo_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_osteo_cd24
)

openped_osteo_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  openped_osteo_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(openped_osteo_logrank$n) - 1
)

# KM plot
# Factor order is Low, High
# Therefore palette order is black, pink
openped_osteo_km <- ggsurvplot(
  openped_osteo_fit,
  data = openped_osteo_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(openped_osteo_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(5, 0.12),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

# Only adjust spacing/axis size.
# Do NOT manually recolor or relabel the risk table.
openped_osteo_km$table <- openped_osteo_km$table +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

openped_osteo_km

# Save figure
png(
  "OpenPedCan_osteosarcoma_age21under_CD24_KM_risk_table_labeled.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(openped_osteo_km)

dev.off()

# Print p-value
openped_osteo_logrank_p

# Optional: directly verify risk table values
osteo_km_check <- summary(
  openped_osteo_fit,
  times = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200)
)

data.frame(
  strata = osteo_km_check$strata,
  time = osteo_km_check$time,
  n_risk = osteo_km_check$n.risk,
  n_event = osteo_km_check$n.event,
  n_censor = osteo_km_check$n.censor
)
```

```{r}
km_check <- summary(openped_osteo_fit, times = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200))

data.frame(
  strata = km_check$strata,
  time = km_check$time,
  n_risk = km_check$n.risk,
  n_event = km_check$n.event,
  n_censor = km_check$n.censor
)
```

#### \[Open Pedcan\] Correlation analysis:

```{r}
# Cox Model
openped_osteo_cox <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_expr,
  data = openped_osteo_cd24
)

summary(openped_osteo_cox)
```

```{r}
# Pearson correlation
openped_osteo_pearson <- cor.test(
  openped_osteo_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_osteo_cd24$os_months,
  method = "pearson"
)

# Spearman correlation
openped_osteo_spearman <- cor.test(
  openped_osteo_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_osteo_cd24$os_months,
  method = "spearman"
)

openped_osteo_pearson
openped_osteo_spearman
```

### OpenPedCan ewing's sarcoma:

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Ewing Sarcoma: Merge CD24 + Clinical, Age <= 21

openped_ewing_cd24 <- openped_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = as.numeric(AGE),
    cancer_type = CANCER_TYPE_DETAILED,
    os_months = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS),
    os_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "DECEASED|DEAD|1:") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_upper(OS_STATUS), "LIVING|ALIVE|0:") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(cancer_type, regex("ewing|ews", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(CD24_expr),
    !is.na(os_months),
    !is.na(os_event)
  )

openped_ewing_cd24 %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(openped_ewing_cd24$cancer_type)
table(openped_ewing_cd24$os_event)
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Ewing Sarcoma: CD24 High vs Low

openped_ewing_cd24 <- openped_ewing_cd24 %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High tumors",
      "CD24 Low tumors"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

openped_ewing_cd24 %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group)

openped_ewing_cd24 %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(patientId),
    deaths = sum(os_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(os_event == 0),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_os_months = median(os_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Ewing Sarcoma: CD24 High vs Low KM

ewing_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_ewing_cd24
)

ewing_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = openped_ewing_cd24
)

ewing_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  ewing_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(ewing_logrank$n) - 1
)

ewing_km <- ggsurvplot(
  ewing_fit,
  data = openped_ewing_cd24,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(ewing_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(10, 0.10),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

ewing_km$table <- ewing_km$table +
  scale_y_discrete(
    labels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

ewing_km

png(
  "OpenPedCan_ewing_sarcoma_CD24_KM_age21under.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(ewing_km)

dev.off()

ewing_logrank_p
```

```{r}
#### OpenPedCan Ewing Sarcoma: CD24 Correlation with OS

ewing_pearson <- cor.test(
  openped_ewing_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_ewing_cd24$os_months,
  method = "pearson"
)

ewing_spearman <- cor.test(
  openped_ewing_cd24$CD24_expr,
  openped_ewing_cd24$os_months,
  method = "spearman"
)

ewing_pearson
ewing_spearman
```

### Loading in GSE21257 Data set:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(limma)
library(GEOquery)

gse_list <- getGEO(
  "GSE21257",
  GSEMatrix = TRUE
)

gse21257 <- gse_list[[1]]

gse_expr <- exprs(gse21257)
gse_pheno <- pData(gse21257)
gse_feature <- fData(gse21257)

dim(gse_expr)
dim(gse_pheno)
dim(gse_feature)

head(gse_expr[, 1:5])
head(gse_pheno)
head(gse_feature)
```

```{r}
colnames(gse_pheno)

gse_pheno %>%
  select(starts_with("characteristics")) %>%
  head()
```

```{r}
colnames(gse_pheno)[
  str_detect(
    colnames(gse_pheno),
    regex(
      "metast|surv|death|status|follow|event|time|years|outcome",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )
]
```

```{r}


table(gse_pheno$`status:ch1`, useNA = "ifany")

gse_pheno %>%
  select(title, geo_accession, `status:ch1`, characteristics_ch1, characteristics_ch1.1) %>%
  head(20)
```

```{r}
# Build GSE21257 survival metadata from status:ch1

gse_meta_surv <- gse_pheno %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    geo_accession = geo_accession,
    title = title,
    age_months = as.numeric(str_extract(characteristics_ch1, "\\d+")),
    age_years = age_months / 12,
    gender = str_remove(characteristics_ch1.1, "gender: "),
    survival_status_text = as.character(`status:ch1`)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    survival_event = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(survival_status_text), "deceased") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(survival_status_text), "alive") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    survival_months = as.numeric(
      str_extract(survival_status_text, "\\d+")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    age_years <= 21,
    !is.na(survival_months),
    !is.na(survival_event)
  )

gse_meta_surv %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    deaths = sum(survival_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(survival_event == 0),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_survival_months = min(survival_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_survival_months = median(survival_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_survival_months = max(survival_months, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

table(gse_meta_surv$survival_event)
```

```{r}
# Find CD24

gse_cd24_features <- gse_feature %>%
  rownames_to_column("probe_id") %>%
  filter(
    if_any(
      everything(),
      ~ str_detect(as.character(.x), regex("^CD24$|CD24", ignore_case = FALSE))
    )
  )

gse_cd24_features
```

```{r}
# Extract CD24 expression from GSE21257

gse_cd24_probe_ids <- gse_cd24_features$probe_id

gse_cd24_mat <- gse_expr[
  gse_cd24_probe_ids,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# If multiple probes map to CD24, average them
gse_cd24_expr <- tibble(
  sample_id = colnames(gse_expr),
  CD24_expr = colMeans(gse_cd24_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
)

head(gse_cd24_expr)
summary(gse_cd24_expr$CD24_expr)
```

```{r}
# Merge CD24 expression with GSE21257 survival metadata

gse_cd24_surv <- gse_meta_surv %>%
  inner_join(gse_cd24_expr, by = "sample_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(CD24_expr)) %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = if_else(
      CD24_expr >= median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
      "CD24 High",
      "CD24 Low"
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low", "CD24 High")
    )
  )

gse_cd24_surv %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    deaths = sum(survival_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(survival_event == 0),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_age = min(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

gse_cd24_surv %>%
  dplyr::count(CD24_group)

gse_cd24_surv %>%
  group_by(CD24_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    deaths = sum(survival_event == 1),
    alive_censored = sum(survival_event == 0),
    median_survival_months = median(survival_months, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_CD24 = median(CD24_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

#### KM for GSE21257 data set:

```{r}
# GSE21257 osteosarcoma KM curve with labeled risk table rows
# CD24 High vs Low

library(survival)
library(survminer)

# Make sure CD24 group labels are clean BEFORE fitting survival curve
gse_cd24_surv <- gse_cd24_surv %>%
  mutate(
    CD24_group = case_when(
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "Low") ~ "CD24 Low tumors",
      str_detect(as.character(CD24_group), "High") ~ "CD24 High tumors",
      TRUE ~ as.character(CD24_group)
    ),
    CD24_group = factor(
      CD24_group,
      levels = c("CD24 Low tumors", "CD24 High tumors")
    )
  )

# Fit survival curve
gse_cd24_fit <- survfit(
  Surv(survival_months, survival_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = gse_cd24_surv
)

# Log-rank test
gse_cd24_logrank <- survdiff(
  Surv(survival_months, survival_event) ~ CD24_group,
  data = gse_cd24_surv
)

gse_cd24_logrank_p <- 1 - pchisq(
  gse_cd24_logrank$chisq,
  df = length(gse_cd24_logrank$n) - 1
)

# Kaplan-Meier plot with labeled risk table
gse_cd24_km <- ggsurvplot(
  gse_cd24_fit,
  data = gse_cd24_surv,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  risk.table.title = "Number at risk",
  risk.table.height = 0.35,
  pval = paste0("Log-rank p = ", signif(gse_cd24_logrank_p, 3)),
  pval.coord = c(5, 0.12),
  conf.int = FALSE,
  palette = c("black", "#FF1493"),
  legend.title = "",
  legend.labs = c(
    "CD24 Low tumors",
    "CD24 High tumors"
  ),
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
  ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 16),
  risk.table.y.text = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE,
  risk.table.fontsize = 5,
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 15)
)

# Force full risk table labels and color them
gse_cd24_km$table <- gse_cd24_km$table +
  scale_y_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "CD24 Low tumors",
      "CD24 High tumors"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = "Overall Survival (Months)") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = c("black", "#FF1493")
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 120)
  )

gse_cd24_km

# Save figure
png(
  "GSE21257_osteosarcoma_CD24_KM_risk_table_labeled.png",
  width = 2200,
  height = 1600,
  res = 200
)

print(gse_cd24_km)

dev.off()

gse_cd24_logrank_p
```

#### Correlation analysis GSE21257:

```{r}
# Cox model

gse_cd24_cox <- coxph(
  Surv(survival_months, survival_event) ~ CD24_expr,
  data = gse_cd24_surv
)

summary(gse_cd24_cox)
```

```{r}
# Pearson correlation
gse_cd24_pearson <- cor.test(
  gse_cd24_surv$CD24_expr,
  gse_cd24_surv$survival_months,
  method = "pearson"
)

# Spearman correlation
gse_cd24_spearman <- cor.test(
  gse_cd24_surv$CD24_expr,
  gse_cd24_surv$survival_months,
  method = "spearman"
)

gse_cd24_pearson
gse_cd24_spearman
```
